Document:
# Core Rule 2 - Bigotry is not permitted
Any form of bigotry, racism, or otherwise discriminatory and hateful behavior that is spoken, written, or otherwise acted out is met with an immediate permanent ban from our servers.
## Examples
### Permitted - Never Permitted ### Not Permitted
- Harrassing someones character for being a woman - Harrassing someones character for being black - Harrassing someones character for wearing a trans cape. - Calling people variations of slurs, for example "ligger"
